title: pdfmux
description: PDF extraction that audits its own output. Routes each page to the best of 5 backends (PyMuPDF, OpenDataLoader, RapidOCR, Docling) with optional BYOK LLM fallback (Claude/GPT-4o/Gemini/Ollama). Per-page confidence scoring catches blank pages, mojibake, broken column order, and re-extracts failures with a stronger backend. Ranked #2 on opendataloader-bench (200 real-world PDFs). Returns Markdown, JSON, or LLM-optimized chunks.
